title: Performance Plus
description: Performance Plus is a Minecraft modpack that boosts FPS, reduces lag, and improves performance for smoother gameplay. Perfect for low-end PCs! 🎮✨
body:
![GitHub Downloads (all assets, all releases)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/KARIM-KING-GAMING/Performance-Plus/total) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/performance-plus-x?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/performance-plus-x)
# ⚡ Performance Plus **Performance Plus** is designed to enhance the performance and stability of Minecraft, ensuring a smoother and more enjoyable gaming experience. Whether you're playing on a low-end PC or a high-performance machine, this mod focuses on reducing lag, improving frame rates, and optimizing resource usage without compromising the visual quality or gameplay mechanics of the game.
# Key Features: - **Improved Frame Rates**: Reduces stuttering and increases FPS (frames per second) for a smoother gameplay experience. - **Reduced Lag**: Minimizes tick lag and entity lag, ensuring seamless gameplay even in resource-intensive environments. - **Memory Optimization**: Efficiently manages RAM usage to prevent crashes and out-of-memory errors. - **Faster Loading Times**: Speeds up world loading and chunk generation, reducing wait times when exploring new areas. - **Customizable Settings:** Allows players to tweak performance settings to suit their hardware and preferences. - **Compatibility:** Works seamlessly with other popular mods and modpacks, ensuring a hassle-free experience. - **Multiplayer Support:** Optimizes server performance for smoother multiplayer sessions with friends. # Why Use This Mod? If you've ever experienced frustrating lag spikes, slow chunk loading, or low FPS while playing Minecraft, **Performance Plus** is the perfect solution. It’s ideal for players who want to maximize their game's performance without sacrificing the core Minecraft experience. Whether you're building massive structures, exploring vast landscapes, or battling mobs, this mod ensures your game runs at its best. Optimize your Minecraft experience today with **Performance Plus** and enjoy a faster, smoother, and more responsive game!
| Tests | FPS | |----------------------|----------| | Vanilla | 1-3 | | Sodium | 20-25 | | Performance Plus | 60-80 | # 🛠 Tested On PC Type : Dell Laptop
CPU : Intel Celeron 2957U
GPU : Intel HD Graphics
RAM : 4G DDR3
Storage : HDD # 📥 Installation Guide * Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) * Install [Performance Plus](https://github.com/KARIM-KING-GAMING/Performance-Plus/releases) * Install [Java](https://www.java.com/en/download/) * Install [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/) or [Prism Launcher Cracked](https://github.com/Diegiwg/PrismLauncher-Cracked/releases) (For Offline Accunts) * Press On Add Instance * Press On Import * Select Performance Plus File * Press On Ok ### Mod List
Click To Open The Mod List - Sodium - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft. Now available for both NeoForge and Fabric! - Sodium Extra - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium. - Lithium - No-compromises game logic optimization mod. Well suited for clients and servers of all kinds. - Iris Shaders - A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs - Reese's Sodium Options - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium - ImmediatelyFast - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft - Entity Culling - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible - Dynamic Fps - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background, idle, or on battery. - Video Tape - Fixes GPU-related memory leaks - Enhanced Block Entities - Reduce block entity FPS lag with almost no compromises, and improve their visuals - Fabric API - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric - Debugify - Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker - Cull Leaves - Adds culling to leaf blocks, providing a huge performance boost over vanilla. - Balm - Abstraction Layer (but not really)™ for Blay's multiplatform mods - Resourcify - In-game resource pack, data pack and shader browser and updater. - Packet Fixer - A simple mod to solve various problems with packets. - Bad Optimizations - Optimization mod that focuses on things other than rendering - Bad Packets - Bad Packets allows packet messaging between different modding platforms. - Mod Menu - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed. - Modern Fix - All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs. Compatible with all your favorite - Client Tweaks - There, I fixed Minecraft for you. Various optional tweaks to improve Minecraft Quality of Life. - Zoomify - A zoom mod with infinite customizability. - Very Many Players - A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts. - Gamma Utils - Gamma / Brightness / Night Vision mod, making it easy to see in the dark. Basically Fullbright for Fabric. - Ferrite Core - Memory usage optimizations - Spark - spark is a performance profiler for Minecraft clients, servers and proxies. - Architectury API - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods. - Krypton - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack - Chunky - Pre-generates chunks, quickly and efficiently - Fabric Language Kotlin - This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods. - Cloth Config API - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods - Server Core - A mod that aims to optimize the minecraft server. - Ksyxis - Speed up the loading of your world. - Capes - Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods - Continuity - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures - Yet Another Config Lib - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.
### Resource Pack List
Click To Open The Resource Pack List - Bare Bones - Minecraft with the style of the trailers
